title: RoboLeague — BVEST 2024
subtitle: To promote innovation and teamwork by challenging participants to design, build, and program robots capable of competing in a Robo-Soccer match.
description: The BVCOE basketball court was transformed into a Robo-Soccer arena where teams competed using self-built robots. Robots aimed to push the ball into the opponent’s goal while defending their own, following soccer-style rules across multiple rounds.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Real-time robot adjustments and strategy implementation
Participation:10 teams participated, with strong engagement from students and spectators across the college.
